title: Shapeshift Every 30s
description: This data pack enables you to morph into random mobs every 30 seconds and gain their abilities
body:
This data pack enables you to morph into random mobs every 30 seconds.

For the Older version, join the [Discord](https://dsc.gg/diversifiedplayz)

#### Required Mods 
- Fabric API :- www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api
- Identity Mod :- www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/identity

Fabric should be used as a launcher:- fabricmc.net/use/

Note :- Make sure to use the correct version of the mods [same as version of datapacks]

This data pack was inspired by Wisp's video

Click on the "Click Here" after doing /reload to start the data pack

If you use this data pack in any of your videos provide a link to this page in the description
